title: Hornet Removal in Larchmont, Westchester | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Larchmont, Westchester. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Larchmont homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert hornet removal services throughout Larchmont, Westchester, protecting homes and businesses from aggressive hornet infestations. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from properties throughout this beautiful suburban community, ensuring your family and pets can enjoy outdoor spaces without fear. With pricing between $350-$550, we offer transparent, competitive rates for complete hornet nest removal and prevention.
whyUs: Our Larchmont hornet removal specialists combine years of experience with advanced safety protocols to handle even the most challenging nest locations. We provide same-day or next-day service to Larchmont residents, using eco-friendly treatments that protect your property, landscaping, and the environment while permanently eliminating hornet threats.
localContext: Larchmont's tree-lined streets, historic Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to Manor Park and the Long Island Sound create ideal nesting conditions for hornets in eaves, overhangs, and mature trees. From the Manor Park neighborhood to properties near Larchmont Shore Club, we've helped countless Larchmont homeowners reclaim their yards and outdoor entertaining spaces from dangerous hornet colonies.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout Larchmont. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. The actual removal process typically takes 1-2 hours depending on nest size and location, and we ensure complete elimination before leaving your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes a thorough property inspection, safe hornet nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and proper disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide upfront estimates with no hidden fees for Larchmont residents.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my Larchmont property and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven methods that are safe for children, pets, and landscaping once properly applied. Our technicians wear protective equipment and establish safety perimeters during treatment. We'll provide specific instructions for re-entry, though most families can return to treated outdoor areas within a few hours.

faqs.question: Do you handle hornet nests in difficult locations like high eaves or trees?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Larchmont team is equipped to remove hornet nests from challenging locations including second-story eaves, attics, wall voids, and tall trees common in the area. We use specialized equipment including ladders, extension poles, and protective gear to safely access and eliminate nests regardless of height or location on your property.
